hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; pnpm exec prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) out=$(pnpm exec eslint --max-warnings 0 "$f" 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; base=$(basename "$f"); if [ "$base" = "pnpm-lock.yaml" ] || { case "$base" in .env*) [ "$base" != ".env.example" ];; *) false;; esac; }; then echo "Blocked: $base is protected. Use pnpm for the lockfile; put sample config in .env.example." >&2; exit 2; fi; }
